task.title: Analytics and Reporting Service
task.description: Implement AnalyticsService for notification metrics and delivery statistics

implementation.details:
1. Create AnalyticsService with metrics aggregation
2. Implement time-series data collection
3. Add delivery success/failure rate calculations
4. Create channel breakdown reports
5. Set up data retention policies

task.acceptance_criteria: Analytics queries return accurate metrics, time-series aggregation works, performance acceptable for dashboard queries
